svg.text: AWS 3-Tier Production Architecture — Week 1 to Week 6
Terraform · GitHub Actions · Docker · ECR · EKS · CloudWatch · RDS
State migrated from local to S3
Every apply acquires DynamoDB lock first
WEEK 3 + 4 — GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline · Docker · ECR
WEEK 1 + 5 + 6 — AWS Infrastructure · VPC · EKS · ALB · RDS · CloudWatch
Public subnets · us-east-1a + us-east-1b · HTTP listener port 80
Target group routes to NodePort 30080 · health check /health
Kubernetes 1.31 · Managed control plane · IAM node roles · CloudWatch Container Insights
Isolated DB subnets · accessible only from EKS nodes · db.t3.micro
IaC to Remote State to CI/CD to Containers to Observability to Kubernetes Orchestration
